Here's what was found and done:

**Finding: Stale ModelScoutWorkflow execution on wrong task queue**

A manually-triggered Temporal execution (`model-scout-manual-1775278358`) was running `ModelScoutWorkflow` against `listings-queue` instead of `scout-queue`. Since `ModelScoutWorkflow` is only registered on the scout worker (which listens on `scout-queue`), the main temporal-worker was throwing `NotFoundError` every ~9 minutes, all day — 19+ logged errors since 17:23 UTC.
